Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 21 Dmg Bonus: 142
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Ignite (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 30
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Lucky Buy at the Bazaar
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2004 at 9:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362996428
Scholar
20 posts
First Post here at Allakhazam, but been around since January.

I bought this at the Bazaar for about 20pp back in February/March, but hadn't had a chance to use it until several days ago.

Great Weapon and a very lucky find . . .
▲ Page top
RE: Lucky Buy at the Bazaar
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2004 at 7:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761812332
Scholar
115 posts
These go for about 40pp on karana server easy.
Picked one of these up for my pally and served him very well. It does seem to proc quite a bit also without crazy dex.
▲ Page top
procs
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2004 at 2:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362907835
View User Forum
36 posts
Picked one of these babies up in bazaar on stromm for 70pp. it started proc'ing as soon as i hit 30. procs quite a bit too, despite my low dex (106) damage is decent, and should be suitable till my early 40s when i'll look for an upgrade - maybe an argent.

QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2003 at 4:10 PM Rating: Decent

264 posts
On the 24th of Oct, I was in CoM wth my guildies helping with part of their epics...and this dropped. I won the roll..not to mention a few other nice drops. It is going to my Ranger for now, but maybe to my pally..if I can get another all would be great.

Correct Price
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2001 at 3:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1620001400975
4 posts
This weapon is worth 2k easy, most weapons with this nice ratio dont have proc's and go for as much. So I plan to sell mine fast at 2k. Good luck, catch me on Quellios if I still have it be happy to sell it to ya, greedy Shadowknight that I am.....Just kidding, its really a good deal at that price.

price
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2001 at 12:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763140376
182 posts
heh last nite one dropped.
looked kinda sucky to me, so I asked if they wanted to roll hehe apparently (sp?) they did.
a 41 Troll warrior with a split paw hide mask, several pieces of bronze and banded won it, his guild said it was worth about 1k (Tallon Zek). When I asked why he only he had that kind of stuff, he promptly answered me: Cause I'm not a twink.

RE: the proc
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2001 at 7:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761195679
203 posts
Don't know specifically for this sword, but ignite is a lvl 15 (or 22?) ranger spell (probably druid too) that does 37 pts damage for me at lvl 27. I don't know whether it is based off level or just always 37.
▲ Page top
firerune brand
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2001 at 12:52 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Procs at level 30. I know this, because i used it from levels 23 to level 41. Started procing the first mob into 30. Proc'd about 2-3 times per fight until i switched to a different weapon at 41.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 26 2001 at 2:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
RE: Does anyone know Who drops this?????
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2001 at 11:48 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
it drops off of any mob in City of Mist... i've seen groups rolling for it after looting from a shadow they killed in the zone. Wu Sticks, the Green Jade Broad Sword, the Kunzar Kujuch... it all drops in the same manner. Only a few items are mob specific in City of Mist
